UpdateIndex.fulltext: Whether to enable full-text index; true means enabled
UpdateIndex.caseSensitive: Whether full-text index is case-sensitive; default is false (case-insensitive)
UpdateIndex.includeChinese: Whether to include Chinese characters; default is false (excluded)
UpdateIndex.separators: Full-text tokenizer delimiters; uses default delimiters if not specified
UpdateIndex.fields: Field names and type definitions included in the field index
